===[[Pokémon Pokopia]]===
Gladion is the subject of the [[Human Records|Human Record]] "DELUXE Alola! (February Issue)", which talks about him attracting a lot of attention at the [[Battle Royal Dome]] after he and his {{p|Type: Null}} won a Master Rank match within a single day of his arrival. The record can randomly be found on [[Dream Island]]s. Upon finding it, {{poko|Ditto}} obtains the Long Bangs hairstyle in imitation.
